description_long: This is a black laptop with a standard clamshell design, featuring a screen and a full keyboard. The screen is open and displays a web browser with the Google homepage visible, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard is a typical QWERTY layout with a touchpad below it, and the laptop's body appears to be made of plastic with a matte finish. The back of the screen lid is decorated with several colorful stickers, including cartoon graphics, text, and logos, giving it a personalized and urban look. No visible brand logo is present on the exterior surfaces. The laptop is compact and portable, suitable for use in various urban environments such as cafes, parks, or public spaces.
description: A black laptop with a visible screen displaying Google, a full keyboard, and several colorful stickers on the back lid. The device has a matte plastic finish and a personalized appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Google homepage and the full keyboard layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the open screen, with the keyboard partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lid covered with multiple stickers of various designs and sizes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen and keyboard from a different angle, emphasizing the device's thinness.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a web browser with the Google homepage.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: Multiple stickers are placed on the back lid of the laptop, featuring various graphics and text, covering much of the surface.
